categories.title: GODS & THEIR DOMAINS
categories.theme: Mythology and religion — answer is the GOD or DEITY being described

clues.clue: In Norse mythology, this all-father god had the Valkyries as his handmaidens and ruled from Asgard.
In Egyptian mythology, this god presided over the underworld and judged the souls of the dead.
In the Bible, this firstborn son of Adam and Eve murdered his own brother out of jealousy.
The biblical name meaning 'who prevails with God' was given to Jacob after he wrestled with an angel, and became the name of a nation.
The Rongorongo script, still undeciphered, was found on this remote Polynesian island whose indigenous culture features giant stone figures called moai.

finals.title: MYTHOLOGICAL UNDERWORLDS
finals.clue: In this classic Tchaikovsky ballet, a prince falls in love with an enchanted princess cursed by the sorcerer Rothbart — and the two lovers choose death together at the end rather than live apart, breaking the spell.
